tools.name: LangGraph
tools.description: Graph-based agent framework with built-in checkpoint persistence, state recovery, fault-tolerant superstep execution, and time-travel debugging. State saved at every step via configurable checkpointer backends (SQLite, Couchbase, in-memory).

tools.name: LangSmith
tools.description: Unified agent engineering platform providing observability, evaluations, prompt engineering. Full execution tree tracing with Polly AI debugging assistant. Virtually no measurable performance overhead.

tools.name: Guardrails AI
tools.description: Open-source Python framework enforcing quality constraints on LLM outputs via composable validator architecture. Guard object orchestrates validation workflows with 50+ pre-built validators from Guardrails Hub. Auto re-ask on validation failure.

tools.name: NeMo Guardrails
tools.description: Open-source toolkit for programmable guardrails on LLM-based systems using Colang DSL. State-machine approach to input/output validation. GPU-accelerated with sub-100ms response times.

tools.name: DSPy
tools.description: Framework for programming (not prompting) language models. DSPy Assertions enable computational constraints with Assert (hard) and Suggest (soft) constructs. Automatic self-refinement via backtracking and retry modules.

tools.name: Instructor
tools.description: Python library for structured, validated data extraction from LLMs using Pydantic models. Built-in retry logic when validation fails. 3M+ monthly downloads, 11k+ GitHub stars. Supports 15+ LLM providers.

tools.name: Pydantic AI
tools.description: Python agent framework with built-in validation retry. ModelRetry exception signals tool function retry. HTTP retry via tenacity integration. Structured outputs with automatic validation.

tools.name: Galileo (Agent Control)
tools.description: Enterprise guardrails platform unifying observability, evaluation, and runtime intervention. Sub-0.3ms inline response inspection. Luna-2 SLM powers detection at 98% lower cost. Open-source Agent Control project.

tools.name: Restate
tools.description: Platform for durable execution of AI agent workflows. Durable journal records every LLM call and tool invocation. Automatic recovery from crashes, resuming exactly where left off. Stateful sessions via Virtual Objects.

tools.name: Langfuse
tools.description: Open-source (MIT) self-hostable LLM observability platform. Agent graph visualization, tool call inspection, collaborative debugging. Framework-agnostic. 50K events/month free tier.

tools.name: AgentOps
tools.description: Developer-focused observability platform specifically for autonomous AI agents. Time-travel debugging, session replay. Tracks 400+ LLMs. Claims 25x reduction in fine-tuning costs.

tools.name: Phoenix (Arize)
tools.description: Open-source AI observability platform with enterprise AX product line. Agent debugging, evaluation, trace analysis. OpenTelemetry-based.

tools.name: Braintrust
tools.description: AI observability platform with end-to-end agent evaluation pipeline. Continuous production monitoring with threshold alerts. Loop AI agent for automated optimization. CI/CD GitHub Action integration.

tools.name: CrewAI
tools.description: Multi-agent orchestration framework with built-in task retry (max_retry_limit, default 2). Manager structure pauses and re-evaluates on errors. Code execution error handling with agent self-correction.

tools.name: Maxim AI
tools.description: Unified AI lifecycle platform for pre-production testing through production monitoring. Simulate hundreds of agent scenarios before deployment. Claims 5x faster shipping.

tools.name: Helicone
tools.description: Low-latency proxy adding observability and caching with minimal code changes. Lightweight approach to LLM monitoring.

tools.name: VIGIL
tools.description: Reflective runtime that supervises a sibling agent and performs autonomous maintenance. Ingests behavioral logs, maintains EmoBank, derives RBT diagnosis, generates guarded prompt updates and code proposals. Stage-gated pipeline. Research prototype.

tools.name: Tenacity
tools.description: General-purpose Python retry library. Decorator-based API with customizable conditions, exponential backoff, jitter. Used by Pydantic AI and Instructor under the hood.

tools.name: Stamina
tools.description: Opinionated wrapper around Tenacity with sensible defaults. Exponential backoff with jitter, limits on retries and total time. Production-grade retry.

tools.name: SAGE-32B
tools.description: Model designed specifically for agent planning, reflection, and recovery. Used in experimental agent frameworks for self-correction capabilities.

tools.name: Ralph Wiggum
tools.description: Viral agentic coding loop tool. Open source, spec-driven. Focused on self-correcting code generation with iterative refinement.
